specs.title: cp-000: Collapsed uncited rows show placeholder badge --
cp-001: Collapsed rows truncate titlesauthors to two lines at most
cp-002: Collapsed rows show Cited Pn chips only when citationLocations data is provided
cp-003: Expanded metadata panel always includes labeled Title and Authors rows
cp-004: Expanded metadata panel shows Journal row only when journal data exists
cp-005: Expanded metadata panel shows Year row only when year data exists
cp-006: Expanded metadata panel shows clickable DOI link only when DOI exists
cp-007: Expanded metadata panel shows clickable PubMed link only when PMID exists
cp-008: Expanded metadata panel wraps abstracts inside a collapsed details element label
cp-009: Expanded action button Open DOI appears only when DOI exists
cp-010: Expanded action button Copy DOI appears only when DOI exists
cp-011: Copy DOI writes httpsdoiorgdoi to navigatorclipboard
cp-012: Expanded action button Remove is right-aligned with ml-auto
cp-013: Clicking Remove prompts Remove this reference from the sidebar
cp-014: Confirmed sidebar removal deletes the reference from the Zustand reference map i
cp-015: Deleting the currently expanded reference collapses it by clearing expandedId
cp-016: scholarsyncscroll-to-reference expands the target reference before scrolling it
cp-017: Scroll-to-reference uses scrollIntoView behavior smooth block center
cp-018: The current ReferenceSidebar does not expose any citation-style switching contro
cp-019: Comment-sidebar local storage prefix is scholarsync_comments_
cp-020: Comment ids are generated in the form cmt_timestamp_random
cp-021: Comment-sidebar reads local comment threads on initial mount
cp-022: Comment-sidebar re-reads local comment threads after each add reply resolve unre
cp-023: Local comment threads sort unresolved top-level comments before resolved top-lev
cp-024: Within the same resolvedunresolved group top-level threads sort newest first by
cp-025: Replies inside a thread sort oldest first by createdAt
cp-026: New local comments always use userId local-user
cp-027: New local comments default userName to You when no custom userName is supplied
cp-028: New local comments default isResolved to false
cp-029: Pending inline-comment adds preserve textRangeStart textRangeEnd and quotedText
cp-030: General document comments save textRangeStart textRangeEnd and quotedText as nul
cp-031: Reply comments save parentCommentId pointing to the parent top-level comment
cp-032: Deleting a top-level comment also deletes all of its replies from local storage
cp-033: Comment count helper counts top-level threads only not replies
cp-034: Comment count helper unresolved total counts only unresolved top-level threads
